title: stichorkis marafungae
intro: Stichorkis marafungae, also known as the Marafunga's Stichorkis, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Zimbabwe. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stichorkis marafungae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a paste.
